/* ============================================================
   Light palette — token overrides for the default $CoreThemeLight.
   The base light defaults already live in $BaseVariables, so this
   file is intentionally empty. Themes that want a custom light
   look can ship their own *Palette in place of this one.
   Part of the active theme's bullet list (loaded into `theme` layer).
   ============================================================ */

tiddlers.title: $TiddlerTypes
tiddlers.text:
* x-twikki: TWikki Data
* plain: Plain Text
* html: HTML
* html/template: HTML Template
* css: StyleSheet
* script/js: JavaScript
* markdown: Markdown
* macro: Macro
* list: List
* keyval: Key Values
* table: Tabular Data
* json: JSON Data
